summary.lv: Redwire Defense Tech Riga meklē Senior mehānikas inženieri, kas projektēs mehānismus un palīgaprīkojumu bezpilota lidaparātu un elektrooptisko sistēmu ražošanai, izmantojot CAD (SolidWorks, Inventor, Fusion 360) un FEA.
summary.en: Redwire Defense Tech Riga is hiring a Senior Mechanical Engineer to design mechanisms and auxiliary equipment for UAV and electro-optical systems manufacturing using CAD (SolidWorks, Inventor, Fusion 360) and FEA.
